detail: Metal GPU working set too full (103% of 107.5GB cap) — rejecting to prevent command-buffer OOM. This model may be too large for this Mac's unified memory budget. This percentage is Metal memory occupancy, not a model-card accuracy or MMLU score. Retry after the GPU catches up, reduce concurrent load, or try a smaller model / smaller quant. Tune via VMLX_METAL_WS_REJECT_PCT (default 99), set VMLX_METAL_WS_MAX_GB to raise/lower the working-set ceiling, disable via VMLX_METAL_WS_GUARD=0.
